text: Prepare the judge-ready repository and Build Week evidence
description: Document the exact post-13-July extension separately from pre-existing Aimparency work. README must include setup, supported platforms, test path/demo access, relevant licensing, and a concise account of how Codex and GPT-5.6 were used, including where Felix made key product/engineering decisions. Preserve dated commits and the /feedback Codex Session ID for the thread containing most core implementation.
reflection: Added BUILD_WEEK_2026.md and README notice: clearly separates pre-existing product from Build Week extension, describes Codex/GPT-5.6 versus human decisions, supported platforms, verification path, tests, and ISC license. Updated submission checklist. Awaiting human acceptance and remaining external submission assets.

reflections.context: Judge-ready documentation required copy that can be pasted into Devpost under deadline pressure.
reflections.outcome: Created devpost-assets.md with title, tagline, short/full descriptions, technologies, testing instructions, roles, URLs/placeholders, and final form checklist; updated completed submission-plan items.
reflections.effectiveness: All non-credentialed form copy is now ready; remaining placeholders are genuinely human/external.
reflections.lesson: Separate polished copy-ready assets from planning notes so last-mile submission becomes mechanical.

status.comment: Judge-facing repository documentation prepared; remaining session ID, screenshots/demo access, and public visibility are human-dependent.
